meme.title: Why cats are the superior life choice

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “do not touch me unless you have a treats"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Why cats are the superior life choice
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-11)

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Can hear her through the screen.
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
